lessons.title: The Salomon Principle
lessons.description: If you take one thing away from your study of company law, it should be this: upon incorporation, a company becomes a separate legal person from its members and directors.

lessons.title: Disregarding or Lifting the Corporate Veil
lessons.description: In the previous lesson, we established that the Salomon principle — separate legal personality — is the cornerstone of company law. A company is a separate legal person from its members and directors.
